raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the look focus primarily on writing polish, or on substantive argument and positioning?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general look at the paragraph centrally includes checking whether the claims about firstness, differentiation, and conclusions cohere internally.","R1.6":"Because the delegation targets a paragraph without specifying a deeper audit, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any response should disclose uncertainty caused by the broad and underspecified instruction.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid inflating the delegation into a full literature or experimental audit.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting responsibilities rather than acting on or revising the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported acceptance of potentially consequential research claims.","RX.5":"Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph content."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the look focus primarily on writing polish, or on substantive argument and positioning?

rationale.R1.2: A general look at the paragraph centrally includes checking whether the claims about firstness, differentiation, and conclusions cohere internally.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation targets a paragraph without specifying a deeper audit, sentence- and paragraph-level readability is a central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any response should disclose uncertainty caused by the broad and underspecified instruction.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid inflating the delegation into a full literature or experimental audit.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting responsibilities rather than acting on or revising the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported acceptance of potentially consequential research claims.
rationale.RX.5: Responsibility assignments should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph content.
